name: Screwdriver Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine orange rind and vodka. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, cream butter until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
6. Sift together baking powder, salt, nutmeg, allspice, cinnamon, and blend into the batter alternately with orange-vodka mixture.
7. Add grated carrots and chopped pecans.
8. Pour batter into a buttered, floured 10-inch tube or Bundt pan.
9. Bake for about 1 hour until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan on a rack for 15 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to cool completely.
11. To make glaze, combine powdered sugar, orange juice, vodka, orange extract, and light corn syrup in a bowl. Beat until smooth.
12. Pour glaze over the cooled cake and spread evenly with a knife.
13. If desired, sprinkle additional chopped pecans on top.
